# backend/routers/admin_feedback.py
# auto-generated explainer · 2026-06-11T10:01:43Z

## Purpose
/api/v1/admin/feedback — rollup view over user_input_events for operators.

Reads aggregated feedback from the global input persistence layer. Tenant-scoped
by default (per rule 8). Aggregations are operator-friendly (counts, ratings
breakdown, comments by tab, recency).

This is a READ-ONLY surface · no writes through this router.

## Imports
- from `__future__` import annotations
- from `_` import logging
- from `typing` import Any, Optional
- from `fastapi` import APIRouter, HTTPException, Query, Request

## Inputs
(no CLI / env inputs — library module or implicit)

## Process
### Functions
- `_tenant(request)`: (no docstring)
- `async feedback_summary(request, days, department_id, process_id)`: Aggregated feedback summary for the tenant.
- `async feedback_comments(request, limit, offset, rating)`: Recent feedback comments (filtered tenant-scoped).
- `_empty_summary(days)`: (no docstring)

## Outputs
- Return values from functions above

## Notable inline comments
- Soft-fail per rule 9 · reads can fail open
- ---- Top-level totals (tenant-scoped + recency-filtered) ----
- ---- Breakdown by active tab ----
- ---- Top-N processes by volume ----
- ---- Per-day time series ----
